layout_note: Typed attachment table in transposed spreadsheet layout: each COLUMN is one transaction; field labels run down the left (EIF, SP/DC/JT, Security Name, Ticker, Transaction, Amount of Transaction A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000, Type of Transaction Purchase/Sale/Partial Sale/Exchange, Capital Gain Exceeded $200, Transaction Date). Selected cells are solid-black filled. Both the 'SP, DC, JT' owner row AND the 'Transaction' label row are continuous black bands across all 4 columns, so no owner code is readable for any column. 'Purchase' is a continuous black band across all 4 columns. Amounts: B band across columns 1-2, F filled in column 3, D filled in column 4. Capital Gain row blank. Footer sheet label: 'MS Areco'. Note printed below the table: 'Note: Dependent Child reporting was not applicable last year'. 4 transaction columns transcribed left to right as rows below.
free_text:
Note: Dependent Child reporting was not applicable last year

Footer: MS Areco

uncertainties.read: SP, DC, JT row is a solid black band across all 4 columns
uncertainties.note: owner codes obscured by the black fill for every column (same fill style used for the Transaction divider row); owner recorded as null for all 4 transactions. Given the printed dependent-child note, the fill may itself be the selection mark, but no letters are visible
'Emept' is as printed (likely typo for 'Exempt' by the preparer); ticker printed as MTXXX; tesseract agrees
